content.en:
"I remember, the artifact spirit of the Hades Temple mentioned after our return, a genius in this cosmic era obtained our clan's Hades Secret Book with the best assessment results!

The Lord of the Underworld Venerable stared at Ye Tian and suddenly realized.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said: "Lord of the Underworld, you are lifting a stone to shoot yourself in the foot, if you don't take out the secret book of the Hades, there will be no such accident today!"

The strength of the Lord of the Underworld is far inferior to that of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, but he also dares to refute: "Lord of the Yuan Dynasty, I didn't expect that someone would be able to complete the highest assessment, and leave a legacy in the Temple of the Hades King, also for the sake of accidents, in case of a technical error, the inheritance can't be broken, right?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu frowned, immediately stared at Ye Tian, calculated again, and said in surprise: "Tian Yuan True Law!"

In terms of value, the Tian Yuan True Law is no worse than the Hades Secret Codex, or even better.

Suddenly, the Lord of the Yuan Gu also shut up.

In the ring.

Although Ming Dong was a little surprised that Ye Tian had received a blow from his soul, he was only slightly surprised.

Just now, he just performed a small secret technique, and he didn't have a real theme.

"Soul Realm, Descend!"

Hedong really made a move, and used his powerful secret art.

Bang!!!!

An illusory soul realm has descended, and countless soul laws have covered this area.

Then, one after another soul chains flew from the depths of the soul realm and attacked Ye Tian.

"What a wonderful soul secret technique, it definitely doesn't come from the Hades Secret Codex!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He knew that his soul power should be weaker than that of Styx, and the soul secret technique he mastered was definitely far inferior to that of Styx.

If he relied on the power of his soul, he would definitely not be able to defeat Hades.

Of course.

His real combat power does not rely on soul power, soul means are just an auxiliary.

Although Mingdong is the son of the era, Ye Tian has many ways to kill him.

However, he can't show his full strength, otherwise he will be easily targeted, and he will not rashly put himself in a dangerous situation without understanding the forces of these twelve cosmic eras.

"The super-god-level space-time talent can't be exposed, and the powerful physical strength can't be completely exposed, so use the knife technique!"

Ye Tian pondered.

He didn't cast a mixed element attack, he only used the Heavenly Moon Sword Peerless Skill, and controlled the power, only showing the combat power comparable to that of the ordinary son of the era.

"Tianyue Knife, slash!"

With a blow that carried the power of the Great Dao, he slashed the soul chain, even if the soul chain was illusory, but it was slashed by the Heavenly Moon Sword, and it was shattered one after another.

At the same time, Ye Tian also mobilized his soul power to prevent the ubiquitous soul from affecting him.

The battle between the two lasted for a while, and there was almost no victory.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian burst out with the power of time, but only with the power of god-level time talent, and cast a great power of time, the wheel of time.

This great supernatural ability can make people enter the loop of time, and even be trapped in the loop of time forever.

If Ye Tian used the Wheel of Time with all his strength, he would definitely be able to make Mingdong fall into a time loop, but he didn't use it with all his strength, but the Wheel of Time that only released water also instantly made Mingdong's consciousness fall into a time loop for a short time.

Then, Ye Tian took the opportunity to hit Mingdong with a single sword.

The body of the underworld is not strong, even if the underworld, as the son of the era, has a strong physical fitness, but it is too weak for Ye Tian, it is a weakness.

In addition, the physical talent of the underworld is not good, and the recovery speed is not fast, otherwise, the underworld would have been invincible a long time ago.

Therefore, after being severely injured by Ye Tianyi, it was difficult for Mingdong to recover, and he was in danger.

Even if the soul secret technique broke out and forcibly broke out of the time loop, it still inevitably ended in defeat.

Just after Ye Tian was about to kill Mingdong, an accident appeared.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying force enveloped the underworld and directly brought it out of the ring.

"We throw in the towel!"

The Lord of the Underworld replaced the Underworld and said directly.

Ye Tian frowned, but he didn't speak, the conversation at this level was not his interference, naturally it was said by those supremes.

However, the Hades Supreme forcibly intervened in the galaxy-level duel, which undoubtedly broke the rules.

At this time, the First Divine Lord of the Protoss spoke: "Lord of the Underworld, what do you mean by this?"

"The junior is defeated, I admit defeat for him!"

The Lord of the Heavens.

"Admit defeat? This decisive battle is a galaxy-level decisive battle, what do you mean by meddling, could it be that you can't afford to lose, and you don't want your son of the era to fall, hehe, won't our two galaxy-level people die in vain?"

The Lord of the Underworld sneered: "How can those two of yours Galaxy level compare to the Underworld, those two are just the substitute ghosts you have found, and they are of no value at all. "

Seeing that the Lord of the Underworld was so helpless, the First God Lord of the Protoss looked at the Lord of the Yuangu: "Lord of the Yuangu, this decisive battle was initiated on your behalf, and now that you have broken the rules, what should I do?"

"Let's deliberate and give you an answer soon!" said the Lord of the Yuangu.

"Good!"

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss nodded.

About a few minutes passed, and the Lord of the Ancient and the Lord of the Immortal Heaven seemed to have a slight contradiction, as if they were arguing, it was just a discussion of the transmission, and the transmission was blocked, so it was impossible to know what they were talking about.

Suddenly, the Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke again: "In this way, you lost two battles, you should have paid the price of 200 star fields, but now you only need to pay 100 star fields, how about it?"

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss didn't want to agree, and he didn't want to pay a single star field, but he also knew that the forces of the twelve cosmic eras would definitely not agree, and if there was a trouble, it would definitely be unfavorable to them.

So, the supremes of the Protoss, the Demon Race, and other cosmic clans discussed it and agreed to this decision.

"Okay, we agreed!"

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss spoke.

Subsequently, they signed a cosmic agreement, and the forces of the twelve cosmic epochs announced that they would never make a move against any race in the universe for 100,000 years, not even against any race.

......

"Ye Tian, you have made a great contribution this time, very good!"

Kunwu Supreme said with a smile.

"Kunwu Supreme, I'm just for myself!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"Let's go, go to the gods and demons of the gods and demons, the benefits promised by the gods and demons, we can't do without them!" Kunwu Supreme said with a smile.

"God and Demon Heaven!"

Ye Tian showed excitement and followed the Kunwu Supreme to the God and Demon Heaven.
